text:
- [escalation] Andy: Newsletter from brother Andrew Lang about making care visible.
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Forwarded message from Rich Lang about Alison's note regarding Erin's show.
- [escalation] Google AI Studio: Google AI Studio urgent notice requiring action to secure Gemini API access by June 19, 2026.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Bug report and feedback about cg website functionality and content issues.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch suggests editing text to change 'human' to 'our' in a line.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch proposes changing popups to hyperlinks to new pages if they cannot be edited.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch approves 'what' page format and requests navigation bar and layout changes.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests moving the VG page inside the performances page with a button and changing a logo color.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports that popup sizing on the first page is broken on mobile or small screens.
- [scheduling] reminders@drchrono.com: Automated reminder for upcoming medical appointment with Monty Owens on June 22, 2026.
- [no action] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Daily brief email with task reminders for Michael Lang.
